pred_reason: The contract uses low-level calls without proper return value checks, posing a SWC-107 vulnerability. Additionally, the minting logic lacks input validation on user-supplied amounts, enabling integer overflow risks classified under SWC-101. Evidence: External call in withdraw() uses .call{value:} without return validation; Mint function performs arithmetic on user-controlled _mintAmount parameter; No overflow protection mechanisms beyond Solidity 0.8.x defaults

Additionally, the minting logic lacks input validation on user-supplied amounts, enabling integer overflow risks classified under SWC-101.
